title: TikTok Made You Buy It — $2,100 Silently Drained
hook: Your social media feed isn't entertainment — it's one of the most powerful stores ever built, draining $2,100 a year from Americans who never see it coming.
angle: Reframes mindless scrolling as an engineered spending machine that weaponizes algorithm targeting, social proof, and frictionless checkout — three specific psychological traps
audience: Gen Z and millennials who regularly use TikTok, Instagram, and social shopping apps without realizing the financial cost
key_numbers: $2,100 average annual social media-driven spend per American
73% of Gen Z have bought something after seeing it on social media
35% more spending when checkout friction is removed
$315,000 compound cost over 35 years at 8% — a full down payment
